prompt: A luxury cosmetics advertisement poster featuring a single upright {argument name="product type" default="lipstick"} centered on a glossy black cube pedestal against a rich monochrome {argument name="background color" default="deep crimson red"} studio background. The product is a bold satin-finish {argument name="product shade" default="true red"} lipstick with the bullet fully extended, dramatic sculpted tip, and a two-tone tube: vivid red upper casing and matte black lower casing. On the front of the black base, vertical white brand text reads {argument name="brand name" default="BOBBI BROWN"}. Place elegant editorial copy on the left side in a refined high-fashion serif layout, split across multiple lines, reading {argument name="headline text" default="It’s not just a lipstick, it’s an attitude."}, with the final word styled in italic and a slightly brighter coral-red tone than the rest of the text. Add 1 small white logo watermark in the top-right corner reading {argument name="logo text" default="Pollo.ai"}. Use cinematic product lighting with soft but high-contrast highlights, subtle reflections on the pedestal, crisp edges, premium beauty-campaign styling, minimalist composition, square format, clean negative space, and a polished ecommerce-ready luxury ad aesthetic.
translatedPrompt: 一张奢华化妆品广告海报，画面中心为一支竖立的 {argument name="product type" default="唇膏"}，置于一个光亮的黑色立方体底座上，背景为浓郁的单色 {argument name="background color" default="深绯红色"} 工作室背景。产品为一款大胆的丝缎质感 {argument name="product shade" default="正红色"} 唇膏，膏体完全旋出，呈现出富有戏剧性的雕塑感尖端；管身为双色设计：上部为鲜红色，下部为哑光黑色。在黑色底座正面，印有垂直排列的白色品牌文字 {argument name="brand name" default="BOBBI BROWN"}。在左侧以精致的高级时装衬线字体排版放置优雅的编辑文案，分多行显示，内容为 {argument name="headline text" default="It’s not just a lipstick, it’s an attitude."}，其中最后一个单词采用斜体，色调比其余文字略亮，呈现珊瑚红色。在右上角添加一个小的白色品牌水印 {argument name="logo text" default="Pollo.ai"}。采用电影级产品布光，具有柔和但高对比度的光影效果，底座上有细腻的倒影，边缘清晰，展现高端美妆广告风格、极简构图、方形画幅、干净的留白以及精致的电商级奢华广告美学。

breakdown.creativeCore: 奢华红色唇膏广告海报：一款时尚高端的美妆广告，展示了放置在反光底座上的单支唇膏，配以优雅的文案，非常适合化妆品品牌推广、社交媒体广告及电商营销活动。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, editorial, minimalist, luxury, premium, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
